scripts.backend: ROOT="$(pwd)"; . ./scripts/load-env.inc && cd "$ROOT/backend" && . .venv/bin/activate && python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py runserver "0.0.0.0:${BACKEND_PORT}"
scripts.backend-stable: ROOT="$(pwd)"; . ./scripts/load-env.inc && cd "$ROOT/backend" && . .venv/bin/activate && python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py runserver "0.0.0.0:${BACKEND_PORT}" --noreload
scripts.frontend-stable: ROOT="$(pwd)"; . ./scripts/load-env.inc && cd "$ROOT/frontend" && npm run build && npm run preview -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port "${FRONTEND_PORT}" --strictPort
install-backend: cd backend && python -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
